title: Samer Takriti
compiled_truth: Samer Takriti is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-13 to 2000-09-01), Samer Takriti sent 7 and received 54 emails, totalling 61 interactions. Top correspondents: [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (6), [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (5), [Chonawee Supatgiat](people/chonawee-supatgiat) (4), [Pinnamaneni Krishnarao](people/pinnamaneni-krishnarao) (4), [Grant Masson](people/grant-masson) (3).
